Harness your power

SPAN reinvented the 100-year-old electrical panel with smarter controls for smarter savings.

A smarter electrical panel that unlocks whole-home, room, and appliance energy data designed to lower your energy bill.

[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628f26de26f0252b4094378b/66d691856cd656dae55a7caa_close.svg)](https://www.span.io/#)

## Disruptive, longer power outages

When a power outage occurs, home battery systems only keep the power on in the select rooms & appliances designated by you at installation. If you need power elsewhere in your home or a boost to your battery life in an outage, you’re often left in the dark with the hard-wired decisions you made at install.

28 million

People experienced power outages in 2023

18 hours

Avg. severe weather outage duration (EIA)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628f26de26f0252b4094378b/6876d2aeebf30541bfd5c09b_screen%20group.png)

## Power what matters

Easily update what rooms and appliances need power on the fly to keep your lights on and the appliances that matter most running smoothly during a power outage.

[Explore the SPAN App](https://www.span.io/app)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628f26de26f0252b4094378b/66dbf33edd607b08df9c302d_App%20Section%201%20(desktop).avif)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628f26de26f0252b4094378b/66dbf35389b1d60204fd5887_App%20Section%201%20(mobile).avif)

## Outlast every outage

With precise control over your home battery, you can power through outages with 40% longer battery life.\*

SPAN automatically avoids unexpected battery drains and overloads before they happen so you always have power when you need it most.

\\* Results from an internal study of SPAN managing backup load priority in over 1200 simulated outage situations. This is an example; backup time will vary based on differences in home energy demand and storage systems.

## Costly electrical utility upgrades

Electrical utility upgrades are when your service provider increases your home’s connection to the electrical grid. It’s estimated that 17-20M homes in America will need an electrical utility upgrade to support major appliance additions (EPRI). Electrical utility upgrades come at a huge cost and inconvenience to homeowners.

$3-20K

Avg. cost for electrical utility upgrade (EIA)

3-9 months

Avg. wait time for electrical utility upgrade. (NV5)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628f26de26f0252b4094378b/6876d44e69732db06108758c_Frame%201437254471.png)

## Skip the hassle & cost

SPAN Panel’s integrated PowerUp technology allows homes to add major appliances while maintaining their current connection to the electrical grid— no electrical utility upgrade required.

[Owner’s story\\
\\
**SPAN saved me $70K dollars in extra costs**\\
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628f26de26f0252b4094378b/66d160ea693b439a2b53e4c2_Nav%20chips.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628f26de26f0252b4094378b/66dbacb36ea52df0b9d976d2_owner%20story.avif)](https://www.span.io/#)

## SPAN takes care of it

In the rare cases you’re using multiple appliances that consume a lot of power at once, SPAN PowerUp automatically manages the appliances in your home and keeps the power on where it’s needed most.

## Peace of mind

You’re in control of PowerUp with the ability to pre-set what individual circuits and appliances are managed.

Traditional electrical panels often require repeat and costly electrical work to meet the home’s and family’s growing energy demands.

SPAN extends your battery life by 40% during an outage and gives you precise control over your energy. Back up your entire home, change room and appliance priorities on the fly, and instantly check how much battery life remains.

## Panel FAQs

What is SPAN Panel?

SPAN Panel is a smart electrical panel designed to modernize your home energy system by completely replacing your existing panel.

With SPAN, you can control and monitor every circuit in your home from a smartphone or tablet, understand how your home is sourcing, storing, and using energy in real time, and modernize your home with electrification upgrades like solar and battery storage.

Why is SPAN more expensive than other electrical panels?

Unlike a traditional electrical panel, SPAN Panel gives you circuit-level control and provides actionable insights into how energy is being used in your home. With the SPAN Home app, you get real-time insight into which circuits and appliances are consuming the most energy, as well as the ability to shut off any circuit in the home at a moment’s notice⁠—even when you’re away.

When paired with solar and battery storage, SPAN makes your home more self-reliant and helps you endure even the most severe power outages by enabling more flexible backup. With SPAN, you can extend your backup duration by powering only the circuits you need during an outage, and none of the ones you don’t.

Finally, SPAN Panel enables high-value electrification upgrades (induction stoves, heat pumps, EV chargers, etc.) that help you move away from gas appliances and prepare your home for an all-electric future.

Which solar & storage systems work with SPAN Panel?

All SPAN Panels:

- Tesla Powerwall 3
- Franklin aPower, aPower2 (with aGate and aGate 1.3)

SPAN Panel MAIN 32:

- Tesla Powerwall 3, Tesla Powerwall 2 (with Backup Gateway, Backup Switch)
- Franklin aPower, aPower2 (with aGate and aGate 1.3)
- Up to three SolarEdge Home Hubs (with Home Backup Interface±)
- Enphase IQ Battery 3, 3T, 10, 10T batteries with IQ System Controller 1 or 2\*
- Enphase IQ Battery 5P with IQ System Controller 3\*

(\*Requires installing SPAN Remote Meter Kit)

How can I get SPAN?

If you think SPAN is right for your home, click the “Upgrade Panel” button at the top of the page to fill out our interest form. A SPAN Authorized Installer will be in touch to discuss your project and any next steps.

How can SPAN Panel help me avoid an electrical service upgrade?

Most older homes weren’t designed to support the increasing energy needs tied to modern lifestyles. Following traditional installation approaches that assume all appliances are drawing power at the same time, many homeowners discover they can’t add EV chargers or other appliances with high power consumption without first performing costly and time-consuming electrical service upgrades. Our friends at Rewiring America have provided [a great overview](https://www.rewiringamerica.org/circuit-breakers-the-grid) on this phenomenon.

SPAN is a certified Energy Management System that works behind the scenes to monitor  electrical loads throughout the home, automatically pausing pre-selected circuits on rare occurrences when total consumption temporarily exceeds the home’s maximum electrical capacity (until other loads cycle off and total consumption drops). Today, this functionality is available primarily for EV charger loads.

Does SPAN Panel require an internet connection?

Yes—an internet connection is required to control SPAN, monitor energy usage data with the SPAN Home app, and receive new features via free over-the-air software updates.

SPAN Panel contains an internet-connected gateway that connects via ethernet and Wi-Fi. In the case of an internet outage, SPAN Panel automatically switches to a cellular backup connection when available.

_(NOTE: Cellular backup should not be relied on as a primary mode of connectivity and may not be available in areas where cellular service is poor.)_

Do I need more than one SPAN Panel?

If your home has more than 48 circuits or a utility service above 200A (or if you have multiple properties), more than one SPAN Panel may be required to accommodate your needs.

SPAN Panel MAIN 32 is not compatible in a multi-panel configuration with SPAN Panel MAIN 16, 40 or SPAN Panel MLO 24, 48. SPAN Panel MAIN 32 is only compatible in a multi-panel configuration with additional SPAN Panel MAIN 32s.

We’re excited to build out additional functionality for customers with multiple SPAN Panels via free over-the-air updates. Review our [multi-panel FAQ](https://support.span.io/hc/en-us/articles/4411635811479-What-if-I-need-more-than-one-SPAN-Panel-) for considerations regarding the current multi-panel experience.

I’m located outside the United States. Can I get SPAN?

Today, SPAN is only available in the U.S. (in all 50 states and Puerto Rico). If you are located outside of the U.S., please keep an eye out for future announcements as we continue to grow.
